title: Elytra Replacer
description: Replace Elytra in the end ships with any item of your choice.
body:
## This mod allows you to replace the elytra in the end ships with any item you want.
### In the config you can change:
- Replacement item - The item to replace elytra with (modid:item_name)
- Search Radius - Radius in blocks to search for item frames around the player
- Check Frequency - How often to check in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second)
- Debug Logging - Enable debug logging messages
